channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BJP directs mandatory attendance of its MPs for three-day special Parliament session on Women's Reservation Bill
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party has issued a strict three-line whip to all its Members of Parliament in both Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha, making their presence compulsory during the special Parliament sessio...

item.title: Elderly Saskatchewan blacksmith continues his lifelong craft at age 89
item.description: An 89-year-old blacksmith from Saskatchewan continues to practice his lifelong trade, demonstrating remarkable vitality and commitment to craftsmanship. Despite his age, he still spends time in his wo...

item.title: NFP set to dismiss KZN chair Mbali Shinga after disciplinary process
item.description: The National Freedom Party (NFP) in KwaZulu-Natal is preparing to dismiss its provincial chairperson, Mbali Shinga, after finding her guilty of defying party directives during a motion of no confidenc...

item.title: Vice President Vance Confirms No Agreement Reached After Intensive U.S.-Iran Negotiations in Pakistan
item.description: U.S. Vice President JD Vance announced on Sunday that talks between the United States and Iran in Islamabad, Pakistan, ended without reaching an agreement after 21 hours of intense negotiations. Speak...

item.title: Territorial Disputes of Guyana with Venezuela and Suriname
item.description: Guyana, a sparsely populated country of approximately 800,000 people and 219,000 square kilometers, faces significant territorial disputes with its neighbors, Venezuela and Suriname. Venezuela claims ...

item.title: Telangana Board Announces 2026 Intermediate 1st and 2nd Year Exam Results
item.description: The Telangana Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE) has declared the 1st and 2nd year Intermediate exam results for 2026 on April 12, at 11 AM, from the board’s office in Hyderabad. The announcement...

item.title: Soshanguve resident’s company paid R95m for Tshwane water transport despite lacking equipment
item.description: In a development that has stirred controversy, the City of Tshwane paid R95 million to a little-known company, Nomakhuwa Trading and Projects, for water delivery services during the 2025 financial yea...

item.title: Sarnia police arrest one suspect in Dane Nisbet homicide, second suspect remains at large
item.description: Sarnia police have made their first arrest in the shooting death of 20-year-old Dane Nisbet, a former junior hockey player from Sarnia, Ontario. The incident occurred in the early morning hours of Apr...

item.title: Police officer’s legal fight after election campaign incident involving missing funds
item.description: This story from Nation Africa digs into an intriguing episode tied to President William Ruto’s political campaigns and the long-running legal struggles of a police officer who got entangled in the mat...

item.title: CBSE introduces Computational Thinking and AI curriculum for Classes 3–8
item.description: On April 1, 2026, the Union Education Minister, Dharmendra Pradhan, unveiled a new curriculum by CBSE focusing on Computational Thinking and Artificial Intelligence for students from Classes 3 to 8. T...

item.title: Carney emphasizes national unity and Liberal priorities at party convention
item.description: At the closing of the Liberal Party convention in Montreal, Mark Carney delivered a speech highlighting the importance of national unity as the party nears a potential majority government. Carney, acc...

item.title: Malacañang Press Corps defends integrity amid false rumors about Marcos’ health
item.description: The Malacañang Press Corps (MPC) on Sunday released a statement rejecting allegations that its members were being paid to hide the real health status of President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. The group emphas...

item.title: HYPREP Reaffirms Strong Commitment to Better Healthcare Delivery in Ogoni
item.description: The Hydrocarbon Pollution Remediation Project, HYPREP, has shown once again say im ready to deliver better and accessible healthcare services to people living for Ogoni communities. As the world celeb...

item.title: Sara Duterte’s legal team remains unconcerned about potential House testimony from Madriaga
item.description: Sara Duterte’s lawyer has expressed that they are not worried about Ramil Madriaga potentially testifying before the House of Representatives. The lawyer’s statement comes amid ongoing discussions reg...

item.title: Liberals exude confidence as Carney's government nears majority in Parliament
item.description: At the Liberal Party convention in Montreal, Prime Minister Mark Carney and more than 4,000 delegates gathered in a jubilant mood as the party stands just one seat short of a majority in the House of ...

item.title: Understanding the Benefits of Owning Hunting Land in Ohio
item.description: Owning hunting land in Ohio offers a unique combination of recreational, financial, and emotional benefits. Unlike public lands, private properties provide solitude, the ability to manage wildlife hab...

item.title: US-Iran Direct Talks Continue in Islamabad Under Pakistan’s Mediation Amid Fragile Ceasefire
item.description: US Vice President JD Vance is expected to speak at a press conference in Islamabad after over fifteen hours of intense negotiations between Iranian and American delegations. These Islamabad Talks, med...

item.title: Baha'i Prisoners Face Persecution Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Since the start of the recent conflict in Iran, reports indicate that Baha'i prisoners, including Peyvand Naimi, are being subjected to extreme persecution. Naimi, arrested during nationwide protests,...

item.title: Horoscope Predictions for April 12, 2026
item.description: This week’s horoscope offers personalized predictions for each zodiac sign, highlighting potential challenges and opportunities. For those born on April 12th, the astrological chart suggests a heighte...

item.title: Opta Supercomputer Forecasts Premier League Outcome Following Arsenal's Loss to Bournemouth
item.description: Arsenal suffered a 2-1 defeat against Bournemouth at the Emirates Stadium on April 11, 2026, dropping valuable points in their Premier League title chase. Eli Junior Kroupi and Alex Scott scored for B...
